ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the city is located */,
  "geo_id" TEXT /* Geographical identifier for the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the city */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the city */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone the city is located in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_risks" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city being assessed */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Overall risk score for climate change impacts */,
  "vulnerability" REAL /* Vulnerability score related to climate threats */,
  "exposure" REAL /* Exposure level to climate events */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity score indicating how susceptible the city is to risks */,
  "adaptive_capacity" REAL /* Adaptive capacity score reflecting the city's ability to adjust */,
  "readiness" REAL /* Readiness score for responding to climate risks */,
  "risk_category" TEXT /* Category of the risk */,
  "risk_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the risk */,
  "last_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last risk assessment */,
  "next_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled risk assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_risks_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social indicator record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city being assessed */,
  "social_score" REAL /* Score representing the social factors impacting climate resilience */,
  "health_index" REAL /* Index of health-related social factors */,
  "education_index" REAL /* Index of education-related social factors */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Rate of poverty in the city */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Rate of unemployment in the city */,
  "housing_quality" REAL /* Quality of housing in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_indicators_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "governance_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each governance indicator record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city being assessed */,
  "governance_score" REAL /* Score representing the governance factors impacting climate resilience */,
  "policy_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of climate-related policies */,
  "public_participation" REAL /* Level of public participation in climate initiatives */,
  "emergency_response" REAL /* Quality of emergency response systems */,
  "regulatory_framework" REAL /* Strength of the regulatory framework for climate resilience */,
  "transparency" REAL /* Level of transparency in governance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_governance_indicators_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city being assessed */,
  "economic_score" REAL /* Score representing the economic factors impacting climate resilience */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the city */,
  "investment_in_infra" REAL /* Investment in infrastructure for climate resilience */,
  "green_jobs" INTEGER /* Number of jobs in green sectors */,
  "economic_diversity" REAL /* Diversity of the city's economy */,
  "fiscal_stability" REAL /* Fiscal stability of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city being assessed */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average historical cost of cold weather events */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total historical cost of cold weather events */,
  "number_of_events" INTEGER /* Number of cold events recorded */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of cold events */,
  "most_expensive_event" REAL /* Cost of the most expensive cold event */,
  "most_recent_event_date" TEXT /* Date of the most recent cold event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_costs_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heat_event_probabilities" (
  "probability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each probability record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city being assessed */,
  "probability_2040" REAL /* Probability of a heat event occurring by the year 2040 */,
  "probability_2030" REAL /* Probability of a heat event occurring by the year 2030 */,
  "probability_2050" REAL /* Probability of a heat event occurring by the year 2050 */,
  "probability_2070" REAL /* Probability of a heat event occurring by the year 2070 */,
  "probability_2100" REAL /* Probability of a heat event occurring by the year 2100 */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the probability data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("probability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heat_event_probabilities_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adaptive_capacities" (
  "capacity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capacity record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city being assessed */,
  "capacity_score" REAL /* Score indicating the city's adaptive capacity to climate change */,
  "water_management" REAL /* Quality of water management systems */,
  "energy_efficiency" REAL /* Level of energy efficiency in the city */,
  "public_awareness" REAL /* Level of public awareness about climate risks */,
  "community_resilience" REAL /* Community resilience to climate events */,
  "technological_innovation" REAL /* Level of technological innovation in climate adaptation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capacity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adaptive_capacities_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the climate scenario */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the scenario */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability associated with the scenario */,
  "emission_path" TEXT /* Emission path associated with the scenario */,
  "global_temperature_increase" REAL /* Projected global temperature increase */,
  "sea_level_rise" REAL /* Projected sea level rise */,
  "extreme_weather_events" REAL /* Projected increase in extreme weather events */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the scenario data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, standard) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user accessed the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the system */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session in seconds */,
  "activity_summary" TEXT /* Summary of activities performed during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city for which the report is generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups the report is shared with */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback on the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mitigation_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mitigation strategy */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city for which the strategy is applicable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mitigation strategy */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the strategy (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of strategy (e.g., infrastructure, policy) */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of implementing the strategy */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date of implementation */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date of completion */,
  "impact_assessment" TEXT /* Assessment of the strategy's impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mitigation_strategies_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
